title: Longest Non-decreasing Subarray From Two Arrays
titleCn: 构造最长非递减子数组

testcases.input: nums1 = [2,3,1], nums2 = [1,2,1] Output: 2 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums2[1], nums2[2]] => [2,2,1]. The subarray starting from index 0 and ending at index 1, [2,2], forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 2. We can show that 2 is the maximum achievable length.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums2[1], nums2[2]] => [2,2,1]. The subarray starting from index 0 and ending at index 1, [2,2], forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 2. We can show that 2 is the maximum achievable length.

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,3,2,1], nums2 = [2,2,3,4] Output: 4 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums2[1], nums2[2], nums2[3]] => [1,2,3,4]. The entire array forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 4, making it the maximum achievable length.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums2[1], nums2[2], nums2[3]] => [1,2,3,4]. The entire array forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 4, making it the maximum achievable length.

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,1], nums2 = [2,2] Output: 2 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums1[1]] => [1,1]. The entire array forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 2, making it the maximum achievable length.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: One way to construct nums3 is: nums3 = [nums1[0], nums1[1]] => [1,1]. The entire array forms a non-decreasing subarray of length 2, making it the maximum achievable length.
